recent_projects.summary: A tile level programming language to generate high performance code.
recent_projects.author: TileLang Contributors, Tile-AI

recent_projects.name: kaiserlift
recent_projects.summary: Science-based progressive overload system for weightlifting and running with Pareto optimization

recent_projects.name: vtrim
recent_projects.summary: Trim detects people in videos and trims segments—without re-encoding—preserving quality and speed.
recent_projects.author: Chiawei Lee

recent_projects.summary: Differentiation Through Black-Box Quadratic Programming Solvers
recent_projects.author: Connor W. Magoon, Fengyu Yang, Noam Aigerman, Shahar Z. Kovalsky

recent_projects.name: dars-framework
recent_projects.summary: Dars is a Python UI framework for building modern, interactive web apps with only Python code. Write your interface in Python, export it to static HTML/CSS/JS, and deploy anywhere.
